name: Dogmatikamacabre
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>凶導の葬列</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラグマカブル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card can be used to Ritual Summon any "Dogmatika" Ritual Monster from your hand or GY. You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field, and/or banish Fusion or Synchro Monsters from your GY, whose total Levels equal or exceed the Level of the Ritual Monster you Ritual Summon, then, if both "White Knight of Dogmatika" and "White Relic of Dogmatika" are on the field, you can look at either your Extra Deck or your opponent's, and send 1 monster from it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Dogmatikamacabre" per turn.
eff: This card can be used to Ritual Summon any "Dogmatika" Ritual Monster from your hand or GY. You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field, and/or banish Fusion or Synchro Monsters from your GY, whose total Levels equal or exceed the Level of the Ritual Monster you Ritual Summon, then, if both "White Knight of Dogmatika" and "White Relic of Dogmatika" are on the field, you can look at either your Extra Deck or your opponent's, and send 1 monster from it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Dogmatikamacabre" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Extra Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
banished: Banishes monsters from Graveyard for Ritual Summon
